nasb.text: and on the vine were three branches. And as it was budding, its blossoms came out, and its clusters produced ripe grapes.

esv.text: and on the vine there were three branches. As soon as it budded, its blossoms shot forth, and the clusters ripened into grapes.

cnv.text: 葡萄樹上有三根枝子；樹一發芽，就開了花，上頭的葡萄都成熟了。

ccb.text: 树上有三根枝子，枝子发芽开花，结满了成熟的葡萄。

csbs.text: 葡萄树上有三根枝子，树上发了芽，开了花，一串串的葡萄都成熟了。
